appartments.title: NEW 3 BHK APARTMENT FOR SALE
appartments.description: Spacious new 3 BHK apartment in Vypin with good ventilation and natural light. Ideal for families; well connected to Kochi city and ferry routes. Clear title; serious buyers may schedule a visit.

appartments.title: Budget friendly 4 BHK Flats in Dwarka Mor location
appartments.description: Value-focused 4 BHK flat near Dwarka Mor corridor in Vipin Garden. Suitable for joint families; metro and daily needs within reach. Negotiable for genuine buyers.

appartments.title: Brand New Kothi First Floor for Sale  In Sector 79 Mohali Airport Road
appartments.description: Brand-new independent kothi first floor on Airport Road, Sector 79 Mohali. Quiet neighbourhood with airport and IT corridor access. Fresh construction; possession as per discussion.

appartments.title: Flat no.2D,Krishna enclave
appartments.description: Flat 2D in Krishna Enclave, Baniyatoli. Compact layout with basic amenities nearby. Good option for first-time buyers in Ranchi; paperwork can be verified on site.

appartments.title: 2BHK READY TO MOVE IN DOSTI JADE.
appartments.description: Ready-to-move 2 BHK in Dosti Jade, Mumbra. Immediate occupancy; society amenities as per project. Thane connectivity via local trains and buses.

appartments.title: 3bhk luxury apartment
appartments.description: Premium 3 BHK luxury apartment in Sector 85 Mohali. Upscale finishes, gated surroundings, and proximity to Chandigarh. Ideal for buyers seeking comfort and status.

appartments.title: 3bhk luxurious villa in Noida Extension
appartments.description: 3 BHK villa-style unit on Noida–Greater Noida Link Road. Open feel with room for parking and family use. NCR expressways and schools in the vicinity.

appartments.title: Elegant 3 Bhk Villa at Padamugal
appartments.description: Elegant 3 BHK villa near Padamugal, Vennala. Leafy locality with strong Kochi connectivity. Well suited for executives and NRIs preferring a calmer address.

appartments.title: 8 MARLA OPP CURO MALL 4 BEDROOM KOTHI
appartments.description: 8 marla kothi with four bedrooms opposite Curo Mall, Kalkidhar Avenue. Retail and dining at the doorstep; good road access across Jalandhar.

appartments.title: Singh Property Dealer 2 BHK MIG Flat Sale In Durgakund Varanasi
appartments.description: 2 BHK MIG flat in Durga Kund through Singh Property Dealer. Pilgrim area with temples and ghats nearby; practical for locals and rental interest.

appartments.title: Malba bachvani he 500 ft size
appartments.description: Plot or built-up space around 500 sq ft in Vallabh Gardan, Bikaner. Budget entry point; verify dimensions and approvals with seller on visit.

appartments.title: Luxurious Flat at cheap Affordable price
appartments.description: Well-priced flat in Chinar Park with a touch of luxury at an affordable ask. EM Bypass and New Town access; growing residential pocket in Kolkata.

appartments.title: 3 Cent's (അടിപൊളി വീട് ഉദയംപേരൂർ) 1500 sqft 4 bhk Rs/- 60 lakhs
appartments.description: Independent house on 3 cents, about 1500 sq ft built-up, 4 BHK in Udayamperoor. Traditional Kerala neighbourhood with backwater charm and Kochi road links.

appartments.title: Shilphata Achar gali room sale urgent sale
appartments.description: Compact room/unit near Achar Gali, Shil Phata—priced for urgent sale. Industrial and residential mix; confirm layout and legal status before deal.

appartments.title: 3 BHK Apartment On Second Floor in Manzil Residency Near Manikonda
appartments.description: Second-floor 3 BHK in Manzil Residency near Manikonda. IT corridor and ORR within practical distance; gated community living for Hyderabad professionals.

appartments.title: 80% LOAN  VILLA SALE @#GUDUVANCHERY #GST NEAR
appartments.description: Villa near Guduvanchery with loan assistance mentioned up to 80% (subject to bank approval). GST Road and Tambaram rail hub nearby for Chennai commuters.

appartments.title: Available 1Bhk Sale In Chembur at 72L* Loan Possible
appartments.description: 1 BHK in Chembur at about 72 lakhs; loan may be arranged per eligibility. Central Mumbai suburb with harbour line and Eastern Freeway access.

appartments.title: Miyapur Aminpur Fully Gated Community Luxuries Flats in Prime Location
appartments.description: Luxury flats in a fully gated community between Miyapur and Aminpur. Clubhouse-style living with strong metro and Hitec City connectivity.

appartments.title: Ready To Move 2BHK Fully Furnished@Karamadai Teachers colony
appartments.description: Ready-to-move, fully furnished 2 BHK in Teachers Colony, Karamadai. Move in without extra spend on basics; peaceful Coimbatore satellite town.

appartments.title: 2bhk flat booking near KMF Nandini Milk Dairy Anjaneyanagar
appartments.description: 2 BHK under booking near KMF Nandini Dairy, Anjaneya Nagar Belagavi. Landmark location for daily convenience; confirm builder stage and possession timeline.

appartments.title: 10.5 marla house single in phase 4 sec 59 mohali
appartments.description: Standalone house on 10.5 marla in Phase 4, Sector 59 Mohali. Premium plot size with independent living; close to airport road and Mohali amenities.

appartments.title: 1bhk in karanjarde at just 16,00,000
appartments.description: Affordable 1 BHK in Karanjade, Panvel belt at 16 lakhs. Navi Mumbai growth corridor; ideal starter home or investment with future Navi Mumbai infra.

appartments.title: 1bhk  in karanjarde Sector 5  in just 24,00,000 panvel Navi Mumbai
appartments.description: 1 BHK in Karanjade Sector 5, Panvel Navi Mumbai. Slightly larger or better finish than entry units; check society maintenance and parking.

appartments.title: Sai spring 2BHK in kharghar sect-35 at just Rs.62lakhs Kharghar6200000
appartments.description: 2 BHK in Sai Spring, Kharghar Sector 35, around 62 lakhs. Planned node with metro, gardens, and schools; strong family rental market.

appartments.title: 1BHK in kharghar sect-35 at just Rs.39lakhs !!! URGENT SELLING!!!
appartments.description: Urgent sale: 1 BHK in Kharghar Sector 35 near 39 lakhs. Quick closure expected; verify loan clearance and society NOC with owner.

appartments.title: Kesor harmony sect-6 kharghar 1bhk at rs 39lakhs Navi Mumbai kharghar
appartments.description: 1 BHK in Kesor Harmony, Kharghar Sector 6, priced around 39 lakhs. Mid-sector location with node facilities and rail access.

appartments.title: 1bhk at panvel sector - 6 28,30,000 near station urgently selling
appartments.description: 1 BHK in Panvel Sector 6, about 28.3 lakhs, near station—urgent sale. CR and future Navi Mumbai airport story; commute-friendly for daily travellers.

appartments.title: 4BHK property in kharghar at just Rs.1.3crore in sector-19 Kharghar
appartments.description: Large 4 BHK in Kharghar Sector 19, listed around 1.3 crore (confirm exact figure with seller). Spacious for joint families; sector parks and schools nearby.

appartments.title: Om Nam Shivay Kalash Tower 1bhk 28lakh karanjade sec-5  money problem
appartments.description: 1 BHK in Om Nam Shivay Kalash Tower, Karanjade Sector 5, about 28 lakhs. Motivated seller; priced for quick deal—due diligence recommended.

appartments.title: Phoolrani housing society 2bhk in panvel sector 17 at just 45,00,000
appartments.description: 2 BHK in Phoolrani Housing Society, Panvel Sector 17, 45 lakhs. Society living with local markets and Panvel station in range.

appartments.title: 2bhk at panvel in sector 6 at just 39,00,000 lakhs near to station
appartments.description: 2 BHK near Panvel Sector 6 / Karanjade at 39 lakhs, close to station. Practical for Mumbai–Navi Mumbai split commute; inspect exact distance on foot.

appartments.title: 2BHK in sanpada astha alavio sect-38 in 66lakhs vashi sanpada Mumbai
appartments.description: 2 BHK in Astha Alavio, Sanpada Sector 38, about 66 lakhs. Between Vashi and Sanpada on harbour line; strong resale and rental in this belt.

appartments.title: 1bhk in kharghar sec 8 Bhoomi heights in 3923000 kharghar sec8
appartments.description: 1 BHK in Bhoomi Heights, Kharghar Sector 8, near 39.23 lakhs. Elevated sector with hill views in parts; metro and Central Park access.

appartments.title: Buye spacious flat 1,2,3 bhk , 95% loan, at vasai east
appartments.description: Spacious flats available in 1/2/3 BHK configurations in Vasai East; loan up to 95% mentioned (bank-dependent). Western line extension; value vs central Mumbai.

appartments.title: 1.5 BHK in Lowerst Rate in Bhandup / near Nahur station & Highway
appartments.description: 1.5 BHK in Bhandup at a competitive rate for the area. Near Nahur station and Eastern Express Highway—suits buyers who prioritise rail and road access.

appartments.title: House urjent sell
appartments.description: Independent house in Banjarawala, Dehradun—urgent sale. Hill-town lifestyle with Mussoorie road options; verify plot boundaries and water source.

appartments.title: Biggest 2bhk in entire mohali on chd kharar highway
appartments.description: Very spacious 2 BHK on Chandigarh–Kharar highway near Sante Majra. Highway-facing visibility; check noise and carpet area claims on inspection.

appartments.title: 4bhk Malayinkeezhu Tvm My House
appartments.description: 4 BHK independent house Malayinkeezhu area, Thampanoor TVM. City-centre convenience in Kerala capital; railway station and government offices nearby.

appartments.title: 6 MARLA KOTHIS STARTING PRICE DETAILS
appartments.description: 6 marla kothis in Sector 59 Phase 5 Mohali from a starting price—confirm exact plot and built-up with developer. Premium Mohali phase near airport corridor.

appartments.title: Makan बिकाऊ है
appartments.description: House for sale (makan bikau) in UP Police Colony, Lucknow. Secure colony environment; convenient for families seeking an address near city amenities.
